title: James Scribner
compiled_truth: James Scribner is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-12-06), James Scribner sent 21 and received 351 emails, totalling 372 interactions. Top correspondents: [Sally Beck](people/sally-beck) (12), [Shari Mao](people/shari-mao) (8), [Bryce Baxter](people/bryce-baxter) (7), [Daren Farmer](people/daren-farmer) (7), [Kim Theriot](people/kim-theriot) (7).
